segments.text: Behold, the day of the LORD cometh, and thy spoil shall be divided in the midst of thee.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: I will gather all nations against Jerusalem to battle; and the city shall be taken, and the houses rifled, and the women ravished; and half of the city shall go forth into captivity, and the residue of the people shall not be cut off from the city.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The LORD shall go forth, and fight against those nations, as when he fought in the day of battle.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: His feet shall stand in that day upon the mount of Olives, which is before Jerusalem on the east, and the mount of Olives shall cleave in the midst thereof toward the east and toward the west, and there shall be a very great valley; and half of the mountain shall remove toward the north, and half of it toward the south.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: Ye shall flee to the valley of the mountains; for the valley of the mountains shall reach unto Azal: yea, ye shall flee, like as ye fled from before the earthquake in the days of Uzziah king of Judah: and the LORD my God shall come, and all the saints with thee.
segments.speaker: Prophet

footnotes: when he shall touch the valley of the mountains to the place he separated

segments.text: It shall come to pass in that day, that the light shall not be clear, nor dark.
segments.speaker: Prophet

footnotes: that is, it shall not be clear in some places, and dark in other places of the world

segments.text: It shall be one day which shall be known to the LORD, not day, nor night: but it shall come to pass, that at evening time it shall be light.
segments.speaker: Prophet

footnotes: it shall be one: or, the day shall be one

segments.text: It shall be in that day, that living waters shall go out from Jerusalem; half of them toward the former sea, and half of them toward the hinder sea: in summer and in winter shall it be.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: The LORD shall be king over all the earth: in that day shall there be one LORD, and his name one.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: All the land shall be turned as a plain from Geba to Rimmon south of Jerusalem: and it shall be lifted up, and inhabited in her place, from Benjamin's gate unto the place of the first gate, unto the corner gate, and from the tower of Hananeel unto the king's winepresses.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: Men shall dwell in it, and there shall be no more utter destruction; but Jerusalem shall be safely inhabited.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: This shall be the plague wherewith the LORD will smite all the people that have fought against Jerusalem; Their flesh shall consume away while they stand upon their feet, and their eyes shall consume away in their holes, and their tongue shall consume away in their mouth.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: It shall come to pass in that day, that a great tumult from the LORD shall be among them; and they shall lay hold every one on the hand of his neighbour, and his hand shall rise up against the hand of his neighbour.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: Judah also shall fight at Jerusalem; and the wealth of all the heathen round about shall be gathered together, gold, and silver, and apparel, in great abundance.
segments.speaker: Prophet

footnotes: Judah: or, thou also, O Judah shalt

segments.text: So shall be the plague of the horse, of the mule, of the camel, and of the ass, and of all the beasts that shall be in these tents, as this plague.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: It shall come to pass, that every one that is left of all the nations which came against Jerusalem shall even go up from year to year to worship the King, the LORD of hosts, and to keep the feast of tabernacles.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: It shall be, that whoso will not come up of all the families of the earth unto Jerusalem to worship the King, the LORD of hosts, even upon them shall be no rain.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: If the family of Egypt go not up, and come not, that have no rain; there shall be the plague, wherewith the LORD will smite the heathen that come not up to keep the feast of tabernacles.
segments.speaker: Prophet

footnotes: that have no: Heb. upon whom there is not

segments.text: This shall be the punishment of Egypt, and the punishment of all nations that come not up to keep the feast of tabernacles.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: In that day shall there be upon the bells of the horses, HOLINESS UNTO THE LORD; and the pots in the LORD's house shall be like the bowls before the altar.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: Yea, every pot in Jerusalem and in Judah shall be holiness unto the LORD of hosts: and all they that sacrifice shall come and take of them, and seethe therein: and in that day there shall be no more the Canaanite in the house of the LORD of hosts.
segments.speaker: Prophet
